window.label: Entire history
window.phrase: the entire available history up to 2026-07-22

evidence.claim: On August 15, 2024, DP World Kigali officially commissioned a 50,000 square meter dry port expansion to boost East African trade.
evidence.snippet: The expansion includes state-of-the-art cold storage facilities and container handling yards to facilitate regional cargo distribution.

evidence.claim: On September 20, 2024, G42 partnered with the Rwanda Information Society Authority (RISA) to deploy localized AI language models.
evidence.snippet: The project will implement Kinyarwanda-optimized natural language processing tools to improve e-government services and accessibility.

evidence.claim: On October 26, 2024, Masdar successfully completed feasibility studies for a 50MW floating solar power plant on Lake Kivu.
evidence.snippet: The floating solar installation is designed to generate clean energy while preserving agricultural land and reducing water evaporation.

evidence.claim: On July 20, 2024, Mubadala signed a conservation partnership with Rwanda to fund environmental preservation in Akagera National Park.
evidence.snippet: The initiative supports biodiversity conservation, community eco-tourism projects, and advanced anti-poaching security systems.

evidence.claim: On November 18, 2024, Rwanda Finance Limited and Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) signed an MoU to accelerate fintech collaboration.
evidence.snippet: The regulatory agreement aims to support fintech startups, cross-border digital payments, and talent exchange between the financial hubs.

evidence.claim: On December 11, 2024, the UAE-Rwanda Business Forum in Kigali focused on accelerating zero-tariff trading under the CEPA framework.
evidence.snippet: Business leaders explored direct market access, focusing on agriculture, critical minerals, and digital services exports to the Gulf.

evidence.claim: On October 10, 2024, the UAE Ministry of Health sent a major shipment of specialized medical and surgical equipment to Kigali hospitals.
evidence.snippet: The high-tech medical donation will upgrade intensive care units and neonatal wards in Rwanda's primary public referral hospitals.

evidence.claim: On January 12, 2025, Abu Dhabi's Khalifa University partnered with the University of Rwanda to establish joint engineering programs.
evidence.snippet: The academic collaboration includes faculty exchanges, joint research in smart cities, and fully funded scholarships for Rwandan students.

evidence.claim: On November 24, 2024, UAE agribusiness buyers signed contracts with Rwanda's agricultural board to import organic avocados and specialty coffee.
evidence.snippet: These trade agreements establish direct logistics pipelines to transport high-quality Rwandan agricultural goods directly to Dubai retailers.

evidence.claim: On February 24, 2025, EDGE Group signed a defense technology and tactical collaboration agreement with the Rwanda Defence Force.
evidence.snippet: The strategic partnership focuses on developing advanced defense technology, cyber security systems, and joint tactical training programs.

edges.claim: On August 15, 2024, DP World Kigali officially commissioned a 50,000 square meter dry port expansion to boost East African trade.
On September 20, 2024, G42 partnered with the Rwanda Information Society Authority (RISA) to deploy localized AI language models.
On October 26, 2024, Masdar successfully completed feasibility studies for a 50MW floating solar power plant on Lake Kivu.
On February 24, 2025, EDGE Group signed a defense technology and tactical collaboration agreement with the Rwanda Defence Force.
On October 10, 2024, the UAE Ministry of Health sent a major shipment of specialized medical and surgical equipment to Kigali hospitals.
